nodes.itemHTML: • Shift Security Left - Cossack Labs - A free biweekly newsletter for security-aware developers covering application security, secure architecture, DevSecOps, cryptography, incidents, etc. that can be useful for builders and (to a lesser extent) for breakers.
• easyvectors.com — EasyVectors.com is a stock of quality free SVG vector art. Download best vector graphics absolutely for free.

AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats

nodes.categoryHTML:
AppImage developer tools

Tools to convert from other package formats
nodes.itemHTML: • arch2appimagestars312 - Python script to convert any Arch Linux package (official/AUR) to an AppImage.

• Blazor in 100 Seconds - September 1, 2022 - Short presentation of Blazor. Blazor is a framework that can build frontend web applications with HTML, CSS, and C#. It leverages web assembly to eliminate JavaScript from the usual client-side tech stack.
• ava-typescript-workerstars1 - use TypeScript in shared workers
• AHK_X11stars484 A rudimentary but functional implementation of AutoHotkey v1.0.24 for Linux by phil294. Forum
• AutoHotkey Plus Plus AutoHotkey IntelliSense, debug, and language support for VS Code, forked by Mark Wiemer from AutoHotkey Plus by cweijan
• Keysharp - Continuation of IronAHK by mfeemster. Forum

• tldraw.com — Free open source white-boarding and diagramming tool with features such as smart arrows, snapping, sticky notes, and SVG export. Multiplayer mode for collaborative editing. Free official VS Code extension available as well.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.completion - Module of mini.nvim for asynchronous two-stage completion. Supports showing completion item info and independent function signature.

• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.surround - Module of mini.nvim for working with text surroundings (add, delete, replace, find, highlight). Supports dot-repeat, different search methods, "last"/"next" extended mappings, tree-sitter integration, and more.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.fuzzy - Module of mini.nvim with functions to perform fuzzy matching of one string to others along with fast Telescope sorter.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#minischemestars982 - Color scheme of mini.nvim which is a variant of base16 with accent colors chosen according to optimal perceptual uniformity.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.doc - Module of mini.nvim for generation of help files from EmmyLua-like annotations. Allows flexible customization of output via hook functions.

• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.test - Module of mini.nvim with framework for writing extensive Neovim plugin tests. Supports hierarchical tests, hooks, parametrization, filtering, screen tests, "busted-style" emulation, customizable reporters, and more.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.jump - Module of mini.nvim for smarter jumping to a single character.

• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.jump2d - Module of mini.nvim for smarter jumping within visible lines via iterative label filtering. Supports custom jump targets (spots), labels, hooks, allowed windows and lines, and more.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.pairs - Module of mini.nvim for autopairs which has minimal defaults and functionality to do per-key mapping.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.trailspace - Module of mini.nvim for automatic highlighting of trailing whitespace with functionality to remove it.

• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.ai - Module of mini.nvim for extending and creating a/i textobjects. It enhances some builtin textobjects, creates extensive set of new ones (like a*, a<Space>, a?, and more), and allows user to create their own (via Lua patterns or functions). Supports dot-repeat, different search methods, consecutive application, and more.
• echasnovski/mini.nvim#mini.sessions - Module of mini.nvim for session management (read, write, delete).
• Rocket.Chat - Open-source communication platform with Omnichannel features, Matrix Federation, Bridge with others apps, Unlimited messaging and Full messaging history.
• Slim 4 Starterstars23 - An opinionated Slim 4 starter template for the small-to-medium PHP applications.
• Slim Validationstars158 - A validation library for the Slim Framework.
• Vigil - Microservices Status Page. Monitors a distributed infrastructure and sends alerts (Slack, SMS, etc.). (Demo, Source Codestars1.3k) MPL-2.0 Rust/Docker

nodes.categoryHTML:
Software

Calendar & Contacts - CalDAV or CardDAV Web-based Clients
nodes.itemHTML: • Bloben - CalDAV web client. (Demo, Source Codestars110) AGPL-3.0 Docker
• farmOS - Web-based farm record keeping application. (Demo, Source Codestars546) GPL-2.0 PHP

• Tania - Tania is a free and open source farming management system for everyone. You can manage your areas, reservoirs, farm tasks, inventories, and the crop growing progress. (Source Codestars585) Apache-2.0 Go

• ioBroker - Integration platform for the Internet of Things, focused on building automation, smart metering, ambient assisted living, process automation, visualization and data logging. (Source Codestars1k) MIT Nodejs
• Fess - Fess is a very powerful and easily deployable Enterprise Search Server. (Demo, Source Codestars668) Apache-2.0 Java/Docker
• Ganymedestars56 ⚠ - Twitch VOD and Live Stream archiving platform. Includes a rendered chat for each archive. GPL-3.0 Docker

• Hasty Paste - A place to quickly paste some text and share it. Mostly used for sharing debug logs and such to help developers provide tech support. The project aims to be both fast and minimal. (Source Codestars70) AGPL-3.0 Docker/Python
• WeTTY - Terminal in browser over http/https. (Source Codestars3.4k) MIT Docker/Nodejs
• j-hui/fidget.nvimstars769 - Standalone UI for LSP progress.
• Arcade Plazastars24 - Hub of online games built by Aryaman Godara.
• Cooststars3k - A tiny boost library in C++11. [MIT]
• Merkaartorstars262 - An opensource OSM editor, written in C++ and Qt
• Book Deals
• Zato - A Python-based ESB and integration platform for healthcare interoperability, automation and orchestration.
• Scalr - Alternative to Terraform Enterprise with OPA integration, organizational structure, custom hooks, native integrations with other DevOps platforms, and centralized reporting. 💲
• Falsehoods about Email - On addresses, content and delivery.
• Gifox - $14.99 - Clean UI, hotkeys, lots of advanced features.
• httptools.dev - Collection of many online checks and tools for web developers, like a JSON formatter, redirect check or URL encoder. Built with Vue3 and vue-router, backend API uses Laravel.
• Redpandastars5k - Streaming data platform for developers: Kafka API compatible, 10x faster, no ZooKeeper and no JVM.
• mypy-baselinestars7 - Integrate mypy with existing codebase. A CLI tool that filters out existing type errors and reports only new ones.
• retypestars128 - Another tool to apply stubs to code.
• typesplainerstars77 - A Python type explainer.
• Everyday Algorithm Auditing: Understanding the Power of Everyday Users in Surfacing Harmful Algorithmic Behaviors - (CHI) Makes the case for "everyday algorithmic auditing" by users.
• aws2tfstars191 - automates the importing of existing AWS resources into Terraform and outputs the Terraform HCL code.
• Bayesian Data Analysis - Chapman and Hall/CRC, 1995. [All Versions]. Don Rubin's introductory book on Bayesian models.
• duckscript — Simple, extendable and embeddable scripting language.stars330
• dgs-extended-formattersstars1 - An experimental set of DGS Directives for common formatting use-cases.
• Graph Proxy - Graph Proxy detects and displays all GraphQL network traffic.
• Cyberowlstars177 - A daily updated summary of the most frequent types of security incidents currently being reported from different sources.
• GraphQL Network Inspector - A simple and clean chrome dev-tools extension for GraphQL network inspection.
• Stargate - Open source data gateway currently supporting Apache Cassandra® and DataStax Enterprise.
• GraphQL is for Everyone by Moon Highway
• Tracesmap - A map allowing for planning routes on OsmCarto and OpenTopoMap-derived retina maps.
• OSM Landuse - OSM based landuse and landcover WebGIS application.
• OsmAPP - A browsable map showing data and offering simple POI-editing capabilities. (Source Codestars51)

• CityStrides - A web platform that encourages the user to run every street in their city. Based on your Strava data it shows where you have and have not run, provides challenges, a leaderboard, and a forum.
• prettymappstars201 - Create beautiful maps from OpenStreetMap data.
• Chris Engelbert - Open Source Enthusiast, Speaker, Developer, Developer Advocacy at TimescaleDB.
• LittleProxystars1.9k - High performance HTTP proxy atop Netty's event-based networking library.
• Dialogue Managerstars415 - A simple but powerful text based branching dialogue editor and runtime (Godot 3.x, 4.x).
• Input Helperstars188 - A helper for detecting input devices and remapping controls (Godot 3.x, 4.x).

• Cauldron — Analytics open source solution that allows users to aggregate information from multiple collaboration platforms as different types of data sources (Git, Github, Gitlab...). Free tier includes unlimited number of reports.
• Sharpened Cosine Similarity in JAX by Raphael Pisoni - A JAX/Flax implementation of the Sharpened Cosine Similarity layer.
• Writing a Training Loop in JAX + FLAX by Saurav Maheshkar and Soumik Rakshit - A tutorial on writing a simple end-to-end training and evaluation pipeline in JAX, Flax and Optax.
• Implementing NeRF in JAX by Soumik Rakshit and Saurav Maheshkar - A tutorial on 3D volumetric rendering of scenes represented by Neural Radiance Fields in JAX.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Tools

Helper tools to add annotations to existing code
nodes.itemHTML: • infer-typesstars0 - CLI tool to automatically infer and add type annotations into Python code.

• Deep Learning tutorials with JAX+Flax by Phillip Lippe - A series of notebooks explaining various deep learning concepts, from basics (e.g. intro to JAX/Flax, activiation functions) to recent advances (e.g., Vision Transformers, SimCLR), with translations to PyTorch.
• sklearn-genetic-optstars156 - Hyperparameters tuning and feature selection, using evolutionary algorithms.
• MIKUFLA - Dance as Hatsune Miku yourself to the song. [日本語/English]

• Render Managed PostgreSQL - Secure, reliable, and completely hands-off managed PostgreSQL. Encryption at rest, automated backups, and expandable SSD storage included in all plans. Plans start at $7 per month for 256MB RAM and 1GB storage (free for first 90 days).
• sht85stars0 - MicroPython driver for the Sensiron SHT85 humidity and temperature sensor.
• Kiomet - An online real-time strategy game in which you expand your territory by capturing towers.
• Coaching Tools – The Plan - By Marty Cagan.
• k6 templatesstars14 - Opinionated starter templates for k6 projects.
• k6-typescript-templatestars140 - Template to use TypeScript with k6.

• FXRubystars242 - A Ruby library that provides an interface to the FOX GUI toolkit.

• DBUtility.TDengine - C# Connector for TDengine. (.NET 6+)
• pikestars155 - Pike calculates the permissions or IAM policy required to build your Terraform.

    Ncurses XMPP chat client.

    A completely Open Source crypto trading bot rewarding good contributions with the SA(Superalgos)-Token.

    A command-line utility that creates projects from cookiecutters (project templates). E.g. Python package projects, jQuery plugin projects.

• olorenchemenginestars49 - Molecular property prediction with unified API for diverse models and respresentations, with integrated uncertainty quantification, interpretability, and hyperparameter/architecture tuning.

• konghq.com — API Marketplace and powerful tools for private and public APIs. With the free tier, some features are limited such as monitoring, alerting and support.

• Forestry.io — Headless CMS. Give your editors the power of Git. Create and edit Markdown-based content with ease. Comes with three free sites that includes 3 editors, Instant Previews. Integrates with blogs hosted on Netlify/GitHubpages/ elsewhere
• diagrams.net — Online diagrams stored locally, in Google Drive, OneDrive or Dropbox. Free for all features and storage levels
